# Sukko Documentation

> Sukko is a multi-tenant WebSocket infrastructure platform. Deploy it in your own cloud (BYOC), connect your Kafka/Redpanda pipeline, and deliver real-time data to thousands of WebSocket clients with sub-millisecond fan-out.

## Sections

- [Quickstart](/quickstart): Zero-to-first-message in 5 minutes using the sukko CLI
- [Concepts](/concepts/architecture): Architecture, multi-tenancy, channels, authentication, message backends, gateway
- [SDK Guides](/guides/sdk/react): React, Vue, Svelte, React Native, and vanilla TypeScript integration guides
- [Deployment](/guides/deploy/local): Local dev (Docker Compose) and Kubernetes (Helm) deployment guides
- [CLI Reference](/reference/cli): Every sukko CLI command with flags and examples
- [REST API Reference](/reference/rest-api): Provisioning API endpoints (tenants, keys, rules, quotas)
- [SDK Reference](/reference/sdk/core): TypeScript SDK API reference (@sukko/sdk, @sukko/react, @sukko/vue, @sukko/svelte)
- [Configuration Reference](/reference/configuration): Every environment variable across all services
- [Editions](/editions/comparison): Community, Pro, and Enterprise feature comparison

## Links

- Website: https://sukko.dev
- Documentation: https://docs.sukko.dev
- CLI: https://github.com/klurvio/sukko-cli
- JS SDK: https://github.com/klurvio/sukko-js
- Issues: https://github.com/klurvio/sukko-issues
